title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is a browser-based AI video generation platform that addresses character consistency in AI films through storyboard mode, camera presets, and a built-in timeline editor. The tool enables multi-shot sequence generation with camera controls and scene extension features, allowing creators to produce coherent short films without external software.
